reason: identifiers.py: baseline snapshot (module_size=121, max_complexity=4, avg_complexity=1.63) predates the committed state of the file at 80d8a18 (#299) -- the file was never edited after that commit (git log --follow shows a single introducing commit) so there is no debt to pay down, only a stale snapshot. The 12 non-blank lines and CC 4->5 delta come from ProgramName.__new__'s three independent path-traversal guards (empty, dot-component, separator) -- see docstring at identifiers.py:68-70. Corrected module_size, max_complexity, avg_complexity to match the already-merged file; all other metrics (method_ratio, encapsulation_ratio, avg_params, classes_per_module, class_to_func_ratio, violations, future_annotations) were already at parity and are untouched.

Lock in the claude_md.py decomposition (prior commit) that the baseline did not yet record. Tighten src/punt_vox/claude_md.py from its pre-split snapshot (module_size 379, classes_per_module 2, avg_complexity 2.55, avg_params 1.0) to the current post-split metrics (module_size 110, classes_per_module 1, avg_complexity 2.17, avg_params 0.83), and add first-time entries for the three extracted modules atomic_file.py (140), managed_section.py (121), markdown_fence.py (60) -- each clearing every OO threshold. Values are per-file oo_score.py output. Scoped to the 4 touched files; the 37 un-baselined voxd/programs/ modules are a separate pre-existing hygiene issue and are intentionally left alone (no blanket make update-oo).

Lock in the AtomicFile consolidation (prior commit) that the ratchet baseline did not record. keys_env.py delegated its hand-rolled atomic writer to AtomicFile: tighten from the pre-refactor snapshot (max_complexity 20, avg_complexity 10.5, module_size 140, avg_params 1.2) to current (6, 3.11, 108, 1.11). Lock atomic_file.py module_size 140->123 and filesystem_store.py module_size 156->151 (both improved by the consolidation). atomic_file.py avg_params (0.83) and avg_complexity (2.0) are left as set for the forced-mode parameter -- legitimately grown feature substance, already at current. Values are per-file oo_score.py output. Scoped to the 3 touched files; the 37 un-baselined voxd/programs/ modules are a separate hygiene issue, left alone (no blanket make update-oo).

atomic_file.py: the fdopen-failure cleanup path now wraps its temp unlink in contextlib.suppress(OSError) so a raising unlink can't mask the original os.fdopen error (parity with the main cleanup path). That fix and its explanatory comment add 3 non-blank lines (module_size 123->126); every other metric is unchanged. Scoped correction, not a blanket update-oo.

Reconcile the 29 previously-untracked voxd/programs/ modules into the OO baseline -- a baseline-completeness gap #307/#308 deliberately left alone (their scoped JSON-only lock-ins avoided a blanket update-oo that would have swept these in). Every one of the 29 clears every absolute OO threshold (module_size <= 300, max_complexity <= 10, method_ratio >= 0.8, class_to_func_ratio >= 0.5, encapsulation 1.0, zero init/public-attr violations, future annotations present) -- no debt is blessed; each is baselined at its shipped, already-clean values. Largest is service.py (module_size 268, max_complexity 6). Also drop the stale migrate.py entry: the file was deleted per the no-migration policy and no longer exists on disk. Values are per-file oo_score.py --json output. JSON-only commit scoped to voxd/programs -- no blanket make update-oo, other files' baselines untouched.
public Python API exports (VoxClient, VoxClientSync, SynthesisSpec, SynthesizeResult) grow the package __init__ past its version-only stub
extracted _validate_and_infer to remove a duplicated resolve+infer branch (max_complexity 11->9, avg_complexity 5->4); the shared 3-arg helper nudges avg_params 2.5->2.6

CLI first-class (vox-2vto): new 'vox voices' command, post-subcommand --json/--verbose/--quiet routed via _apply_output_flags, and stdin resolution helpers. Typer requires every CLI option as a flat function parameter and cannot bundle them into an object, so avg_params/avg_complexity/module_size growth on this __main__ entry point is unavoidable feature substance.

CLI first-class (vox-2vto): new 'vox voices' command, post-subcommand --json/--verbose/--quiet routed via _apply_output_flags, and stdin resolution helpers. Typer requires every CLI option as a flat function parameter, so avg_params/avg_complexity/module_size growth on this __main__ entry point is unavoidable feature substance.

Extracting the CLI I/O helpers into cli_io.py retires __main__'s module_size relax (1000 -> 904, below the 905 base) and pays down avg_complexity (3.73 -> 3.59). The extraction leaves the param-heavy Typer command functions behind, so avg_params (2.21 -> 2.41) grows -- Typer requires every option as a flat parameter and cannot bundle them into an object.

Adds the error() sibling to emit() so --json error paths emit a structured {error: ...} object on stdout instead of blank stdout plus plain-text stderr. OutputFormatter is a minimal value class with no internal debt to offset the new method's 2 params / 1 branch / ~11 lines, so module_size/avg_params/avg_complexity grow irreducibly.

Extracts _SpeechRequest (per-request wire context: parse plus id-stamped replies) to remove the 16-line SynthesisSpec duplication across both handlers and stop threading 4 loose primitives through the synthesize steps. That third value class trips classes_per_module 2->3 (<=3 ceiling) while breaking the complexity-14 __call__ god-method: max_complexity 14->8, avg_complexity 4.33->2.75, module_size 255->241 all improve.

cli_io is new on this branch; Fix-3 routes its two empty-input error paths through OutputFormatter.error() (for structured --json errors) and restores the full explanatory comment on the mutual-exclusion accumulation that an earlier commit over-compressed. module_size 116->118 records the file's honest size with readable comments.
VoxError base class added so callers can catch one VoxError (bead finding 2)
extracted _decode helper deduplicating the error-frame check across both transport receive paths
export VoxError and the two concrete client exceptions from the public package
extract _expand_parts to share the snake/camel expand-rejoin tail; lowers max and avg complexity
export PromptSet so callers can author program prompts without a non-public import
consumer-facing class docstring plus async context-manager support (aenter/aexit)
consumer-facing class docstring documenting the per-call lifecycle
PEP 562 lazy re-exports: a module __getattr__ replaces eager imports so importing a light voxd.programs value type no longer loads the whole daemon
health/program methods now parse the wire into typed result objects, moving that logic in from the gateway
typed result imports and retyped program/health return signatures
export the four typed client result types (HealthStatus, ProgramStatus, CommandOutcome, ProgramSummary)
CommandOutcome docstring states plainly that the live protocol acks at enqueue and never emits a rejection; the type is kept forward-looking
_outcome docstring states the live protocol acks at enqueue (applied always True) and the parse is forward-looking
wire-parse boundary guard wraps JsonObject ValueError as VoxdProtocolError so every public-method failure is a VoxError
Program.to_status builds its own neutral ProgramStatus view (state+behavior on the domain object), moved off the wire type
module now holds only the mutable PlaybackHealth slot; the fault value types moved to the neutral types_programs.playback_fault
public re-exports consolidated through the neutral types_programs package
consolidated wire-type import from the neutral types_programs package
consolidated wire-type import from the neutral types_programs package

Anchored git-push-ok to git's real push-ref shapes (sha range, [new branch], -> refs/origin) and git-commit to branch+short-sha; the multi-line regex adds 11 lines. Fixes success-marker false positives on paths containing 'main' and on bracket log lines.

Failure-first classification: a structured failure verdict now wins over a masking exit 0 (pytest|tee, make test||true). Unified signal() lowered max_complexity 5->4 and avg 2.75->2.5; module_size +3 for the extra branch and revised docstring.

Added _ContinuousAnnouncement value class deduping the four continuous-mode handlers; classes_per_module 0->1 is unavoidable growth carrying improvements to method_ratio, class_to_func_ratio, avg_complexity, module_size, and max_complexity (silent-failure fix vox-ek1m).

vibe_signals str field swapped for an int vibe_nudge_turns cadence counter plus a VoxConfig.coerce_turns validator; module_size/class_to_func_ratio grow to carry the coercion while method_ratio/avg_params/avg_complexity improve (vox-ek1m)

removed the dead _vibe_signals field and its read property from SessionConfig; method_ratio/avg_params shift mechanically from deleting a zero-arg property while module_size/avg_complexity improve (vox-ek1m)

vibe_cmd routed through VibeChange so CLI and MCP share one transition rule; a transient mid-refactor update recorded 898, current 899 is the accurate post-refactor size and still improves on committed 901 (vox-ek1m)
